ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school the team represents */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "coach_email" TEXT /* Email address of the team coach */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event is held */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event is held */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., regional, national) */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for team registration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event the match is part of */,
  "match_number" INTEGER /* Number of the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match is played */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time when the match is played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team performance */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "qual_avg" REAL /* Average qualification score */,
  "auto_score" INTEGER /* Score for autonomous performance */,
  "container_score" INTEGER /* Score for container stacking */,
  "coopertition_score" INTEGER /* Score for coopertition */,
  "litter_score" INTEGER /* Score for litter collection */,
  "tote_score" INTEGER /* Score for tote stacking */,
  "penalty_points" INTEGER /* Penalty points deducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performances_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performances_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Final rank of the team in the event */,
  "played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the team in the event */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team in the event */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team in the event */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties by the team in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., organizer, participant, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, data entry, report generation) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the system was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., system error, user action) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time when the event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_teams" (
  "event_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event-team association */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_teams_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_teams" (
  "match_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match-team association */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_teams_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
